name: Yuki-Onna, the Ice Mayakashi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つらら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まやかし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>雪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おんな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2 "Mayakashi" monsters
You can only control 1 "Yuki-Onna, the Ice Mayakashi". While this card points to a Synchro Monster(s), your opponent's monsters cannot target this card for attacks. If a Synchro Monster(s) in your possession is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect while this card is on the field: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; its ATK/DEF become half its current ATK/DEF until the end of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Yuki-Onna, the Ice Mayakashi" once per turn.
